summary: Tested Partner Portal refactored components. Login works with wise-test@partner.com. All 8 navigation tabs functional (Dashboard, Scanner, Pay, Gutscheine, Statistiken, Auszahlungen, Verifizierung, Profil, Mitarbeiter). Language switching works (19 languages). CRITICAL: Translation keys showing instead of translated text in Statistics, Profile, and Verification views.

ui_bugs.issue: Translation keys showing instead of translated text: 'created', 'financialOverview', 'totalRevenue', 'commissionPaid', 'paidOut', 'voucherStatus'

frontend_tests.login_page: PASS - Shows login form with Admin-Login/Mitarbeiter-Login tabs, email/password fields
frontend_tests.login_flow: PASS - Login with wise-test@partner.com / Test123! works correctly
frontend_tests.dashboard_view: PASS - Shows 4 stats cards (Ausstehend €200.00, Eingelöst 0, Verkauft 0, Provision 10%), 'Letzte Einlösungen' section
frontend_tests.scanner_view: PASS - Shows 'Gutschein scannen' with 'Kamera starten' button and manual input
frontend_tests.vouchers_view: PASS - Shows 'Meine Gutscheine' with 'Gutschein erstellen' button, 'Noch keine Gutscheine'
frontend_tests.statistics_view: PARTIAL - View loads but translation keys showing instead of translated text
frontend_tests.payouts_view: PASS - Shows €200.00 Verfügbar, bank connected (Afrim Krasniqi ****9093), payout history
frontend_tests.verification_view: PARTIAL - View loads but translation keys showing instead of translated text
frontend_tests.profile_view: PARTIAL - View loads, logo upload works, bank details form works, but 'accountInfo' key showing
frontend_tests.staff_view: PASS - Shows 'Mitarbeiter erstellen' form with Name/E-Mail/Passwort/Rolle fields
frontend_tests.language_switching: PASS - 19 languages available, switching to English updates UI correctly
frontend_tests.navigation_tabs: PASS - All 8 tabs clickable and functional

action_items: FIX REQUIRED: PartnerPortal.js uses inline translations that are missing keys needed by extracted components. The partnerTranslations.js file has the complete translations but is not being used. Either import and use partnerTranslations.js OR add missing keys to inline translations.

Missing translation keys in PartnerPortal.js: created, financialOverview, totalRevenue, commissionPaid, paidOut, voucherStatus, topVouchers, revenue, redemptionsChart, accountInfo, verified, inReview, moreInfoRequired, notVerified, verifiedDescription, inReviewDescription, notVerifiedDescription, businessRegistration, taxCertificate, idDocument, bankStatement, other, selectFile, uploadedDocuments, approved, rejected, noDocuments, verificationInfo, verificationHint1, verificationHint2, verificationHint3, settings
critical_code_review_comments: partnerTranslations.js exists with complete translations but is NOT imported/used in PartnerPortal.js
PartnerPortal.js defines translations inline but is missing ~30 keys needed by extracted components
The extracted components (PartnerStatistics, PartnerProfile, PartnerVerification) use t() function with fallbacks, but fallbacks only work for German - other languages show raw keys
Recommendation: Import { translations, getLangKey } from partnerTranslations.js and use them instead of inline translations

success_rate.frontend: 75% - All views load but 3 views have translation issues

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test partner (Wise Test Partner - Restaurant)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Portal refactoring tested. All 8 navigation tabs work. Main issue: Translation keys showing in Statistics, Profile, and Verification views because PartnerPortal.js uses incomplete inline translations instead of the complete partnerTranslations.js file. Test partner: wise-test@partner.com / Test123! has €200.00 pending balance, bank connected (Afrim Krasniqi ****9093), 2 payouts in history.

root_cause_analysis.issue: Translation keys showing instead of translated text in PartnerStatistics, PartnerProfile, and PartnerVerification components
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: PartnerPortal.js defines translations inline in the t() function but is missing ~30 translation keys that the extracted components need. The partnerTranslations.js file has complete translations but is not being imported or used.
reproduction_steps: 1. Login to Partner Portal with wise-test@partner.com / Test123!
2. Navigate to Statistiken tab - see 'created', 'financialOverview', etc. as raw keys
3. Navigate to Verifizierung tab - see 'notVerified', 'selectFile', etc. as raw keys
4. Navigate to Profil tab - see 'accountInfo' as raw key
root_cause_analysis.fix_suggestion: In PartnerPortal.js, replace the inline t() function with: import { translations, getLangKey } from '../components/partner/partnerTranslations'; and update t() to use these translations
